features.name: Hardware Detection
features.description: Detect RAM, CPU cores, GPU VRAM, and acceleration backend

features.name: Model Database
features.description: Load and cache hf_models.json from llmfit repo (206+ models)

features.name: Fit Ranking
features.description: Score and rank models by how well they fit your hardware

features.name: Scoring Engine
features.description: Multi-dimensional scoring: Quality, Speed, Fit, Context

features.name: Dynamic Quantization Selection
features.description: Pick best quantization that fits available memory

features.name: MoE Architecture Support
features.description: Reduce memory estimates for Mixture-of-Experts models using active expert count

features.name: Model Search
features.description: Search models by name, provider, or size

features.name: Model Detail View
features.description: Show detailed info for a single model

features.name: GPU Memory Override
features.description: Manually specify VRAM when autodetection fails

features.name: Context Length Cap
features.description: Cap context length used for memory estimation
